rules.name: nvda-enters-first-buy-zone
rules.position_suggestion_cn: 建议仓位：先建 25% 试探仓，若回踩 176-178 区间不破，再加到 40%-50%。
rules.position_suggestion_en: Position sizing: start with a 25% starter position. If NVDA holds the 176-178 area on a retest, add toward 40%-50%.

rules.name: nvda-turns-bullish
rules.title_cn: 英伟达转入观察买入阶段
rules.position_suggestion_cn: 建议仓位：先建 15%-20% 观察仓，等下一根确认阳线或放量后再扩大仓位。
rules.position_suggestion_en: Position sizing: start with a 15%-20% pilot position, then size up only after a confirming follow-through bar or stronger volume.

rules.name: nvda-breakout-buy-trigger
rules.position_suggestion_cn: 建议仓位：先建 20% 突破仓，若收盘继续站上 188.88 并放量，再加到 40%-60%。
rules.position_suggestion_en: Position sizing: start with a 20% breakout position. If NVDA closes above 188.88 with volume confirmation, add toward 40%-60%.
